title: Item & Entity NBT Viewer
description: A simple mod that allows you to view the NBT data of mobs and items
body:
[![Create a server with BisectHosting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cd259b24ec269f2de94c3d6921bae68ef9ee9385_0.webp)](https://url-shortener.curseforge.com/ufT02)

Simple mod to view Item and Entity NBT data

Press P while holding an item to view its NBT data

Press O while looking at an entity to view its NBT data
